info.name: Kyros API — Full Platform
info.description:
Complete Postman collection covering all six surfaces of the Kyros Clinic platform.

Folders:
- 00 — Demo & Smoke: run top-to-bottom after `make seed`
- 01 — Auth: signup, OTP, login, MFA, password reset, Google OAuth
- 02 — Mobile (Patient): consultations, lab reports, prescriptions, care plans, education, vitals, reminders, notes, ABHA
- 03 — Website (Public): conditions, booking inquiry, leads
- 04 — Doctor: profile, patients, consultations, prescriptions, care plans, schedule, video, lab review, content review
- 05 — Care Coordinator (Admin UI): login, intake, patients, scheduling, follow-ups, inquiries, communication
- 06 — Admin / Super Admin (API): analytics, pricing, coupons, doctors, content, DSR, internal
- 07 — Admin / Super Admin (UI): login, dashboard, doctors, users, consultations, payments, settings, audit, staff, content, DSR, pricing, coupons
- 08 — Payments: order, verify, refunds
- 09 — Webhooks: Razorpay

Demo accounts (synthetic dev fixtures, password `DemoPass123!`):
| Role | Phone | Email |
|---|---|---|
| Patient | +919700000001…05 | sunita.reddy@dev.kyros.local … |
| Doctor | +919800000001…03 | dr.meera@dev.kyros.local … |
| Coordinator | +919800000010 | ananya.menon@dev.kyros.local |
| Admin/Super Admin | created via `python scripts/create_staff_user.py` |

With KYROS_DEBUG=true the signup/OTP response includes `otp_hint`.

exec: pm.test('PHI cache protection: Cache-Control is no-store', () => {

item.name: 00 — Demo & Smoke
item.description:
Run top-to-bottom with the Collection Runner against a dev backend after `make seed`.

Demo accounts (synthetic, dev-only):
| Role | Phone | Email |
|---|---|---|
| Patient | +919700000001…05 | sunita.reddy@dev.kyros.local … |
| Doctor | +919800000001…03 | dr.meera@dev.kyros.local … |
| Coordinator | +919800000010 | ananya.menon@dev.kyros.local |

Password for all: `DemoPass123!`.

item.name: 01 — Auth
item.description: Authentication flows: signup, OTP, login, MFA, password reset, Google OAuth. All surfaces share the /v1/auth/* endpoints.

item.name: 02 — Mobile (Patient)
item.description: All patient-facing API endpoints used by the Expo mobile app and React Native Web patient portal. Login first via 01-Auth, then use these with the bearer token.

item.name: 03 — Website (Public)
item.description: Public-facing endpoints used by the marketing website (Next.js). No authentication required.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Prospective Patient",
  "phone": "+919700000099",
  "otp": "123456",
  "condition_category": "thyroid",
  "message": "I'd like to consult about my thyroid levels"
}

item.name: 04 — Doctor Portal
item.description: Doctor-facing API endpoints used by the Vite + React doctor portal. Login as doctor first via 01-Auth.

item.name: 05 — Care Coordinator (UI)
item.description:
Coordinator portal (Jinja2 + HTMX). Login via /coord/login with session cookies. Create coordinator accounts via `python scripts/create_staff_user.py --role coordinator`.

These are server-rendered HTML pages, not JSON APIs. Use Postman's 'Preview' tab to view rendered HTML.

item.name: 06 — Admin / Super Admin (API)
item.description: Admin-only JSON API endpoints at /v1/admin/*. Login as admin/super_admin first via 01-Auth (JWT). These require RBAC permissions (PRICING_MANAGE, DSR_PROCESS, CONTENT_PUBLISH, etc.).

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Understanding Your Thyroid",
  "content_type": "article",
  "body": "Your thyroid gland produces hormones that regulate metabolism...",
  "condition_categories": ["thyroid"],
  "tags": ["thyroid", "education"]
}

item.name: 07 — Admin / Super Admin (UI)
item.description:
Admin portal (Jinja2 + HTMX). Login via /admin/login with session cookies. Create admin accounts via `python scripts/create_staff_user.py --role super_admin` or `--role admin`.

Super Admin: full read+write access.
Admin: read-only (cannot suspend users, verify doctors, set revenue share, or publish content).

These are server-rendered HTML pages. Use Postman's 'Preview' tab to view rendered HTML.

item.name: 08 — Payments
item.description: Payment endpoints used by the mobile app (Razorpay integration). Requires patient auth.

item.name: 10 — Wellness (Reminders & Vitals)
item.description: Wellness tracking endpoints used by the mobile app. Requires patient auth.
